hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=f.endswith(('.pas','.dfm')); print('[CP949] Write tool blocked on .pas/.dfm - use Edit tool or Python cp949 method') if blocked else None; sys.exit(2 if blocked else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); warn=f.endswith(('.pas','.dfm')); print('[CP949 WARNING] Edit on .pas/.dfm detected. Ensure old_string/new_string boundaries do NOT include Korean characters. Use Python cp949 method for Korean comments.') if warn else None; sys.exit(0)"
